mapper.select: select * from campos_tipo_documento as a, metadata as m where a.tido_id = #{tidoId} and a.meta_id = m.meta_id order by a.secuencia ASC
select * from metadata order by meta_descripcion asc
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO campos_tipo_documento(tido_id, meta_id, catd_estado, tido_version, tipo_dato, defecto, obligado, secuencia) VALUES (#{tidoId}, #{id}, #{timeEstado}, #{tidoVersion}, #{tipoDato}, #{defecto}, #{obligado}, #{secuencia});

select case when max(meta_id) is null then '1' else max(meta_id)+1 end id from metadata
INSERT INTO metadata( meta_id, meta_descripcion, meta_manual, meta_valores, meta_estado) VALUES (#{id}, #{campo}, true, '', true);
mapper.select: select case when max(meta_id) is null then '1' else max(meta_id) end id from metadata
select count(meta_id)::integer from metadata where meta_descripcion = #{campo}
select count(meta_id)::integer from metadata where meta_descripcion = #{campo} and meta_id!=#{id}
select * from campos_tipo_documento where tido_id = #{tidoId} and meta_id = #{id}
select meta_descripcion from metadata where meta_id = cast(#{id} as integer)
